```
    static void b64from24bit(
            final byte b2,
            final byte b1,
            final byte b0,
            final int outLen,
            final StringBuilder buffer) {
        int w = ((b2 << 16) & 0x00ffffff) | ((b1 << 8) & 0x00ffff) | (b0 & 0xff);
        int n = outLen;
        while (n-- > 0) {
            buffer.append(B64T_ARRAY[w & 0x3f]);
            w >>= 6;
        }
    }
```

```
        return saltString.toString();
```
